title: ORDI Token Explodes 162% in 24 Hours: Bitcoin Ordinals Pioneer Surges to $7.35
excerpt: ORDI, the first BRC-20 token built on Bitcoin's Ordinals protocol, has skyrocketed 162% in the past 24 hours to reach $7.35. The dramatic price surge highlights renewed interest in Bitcoin-based token standards and the growing Ordinals ecosystem.
